notes: In-app browser preview (⌘⇧B or 'Toggle Browser Panel' in the palette) — a native pane for the local web app you're building; log in once and re-check after each edit. Claude tabs can drive it too: navigate, run JS, read the captured console/network. The AI Trail's forward-facing worktree Standing band (⌘⇧T). Copilot fully integrated — status pills and quota for npm-installed Copilot. Fixes from the Paseo/OpenChamber code-cross: hooks no longer hijack every claude run on the machine, ZDOTDIR restored exactly as found, and more.
